LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER SIERRA CLUB'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE WAS ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. RULING: MATTER IS REMANDED TO THE COASTAL COMMISSION FOR FURTHER PROCEEDINGS CONSISTENT WITH THE STATEMENT OF DECISION; COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER SHALL PREPARE A PROPOSED JUDGMENT AND PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE CONSISTENT WITH THE STATEMENT OF DECISION WITHIN 10 DAYS OF 02/07/05. THE COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER PETITIONER'S PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO THE SCHEDULE SET FORTH IN THE CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT. HON. JAMES L. WARREN; COURT REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON CSR 1558

Motion For Attorney'S Fees
Off Calendar Aug-31-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Stephan Volker, Esq., 510-496-0600 for petitioner and moving party SIERRA CLUB, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION.
Lisa Trankley, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, 916-327-7877 for respondent and opposing party California Coastal Commission.
David Lanferman, Esq. and Aaron Foxworthy, Esq. of Sheppard & Mullen, 415-774-2996 for Real Party in Interest, David Luers.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court GRANTED PETITIONER SIERRA CLUB, A CALIFORNIA NON-PROFIT CORPORATION'S Motion For Attorney'S Fees AND COSTS. PRVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER WITH THE AMOUNTS BLANK FOR THE COURT TO FILL IN. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558. (301/JLW/DS)

MOTION TO TAX COSTS
Off Calendar May-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Lisa Tankley, Deputy Attorney General 916/327-7877, appearing for respondent/moving party California Costal Commission
Stephan C. Volker, Esq., 510/496-0600, appearing for petitioner and opposing party Sierra Club

RULING:
No argument was made. Counsel read their stipulation regarding costs on the record. Details as follows: $442.30 for filing and motion fees, $24.80 for service of process, $965 for court reporter fees, $1,378.75 for reproduction fees, in the total amount of $2,810.85. The Court granted the stipulation. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. (301/JLW/DS) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR# 1558
